activity_description: Designed persistent memory architecture for Home Assistant AI agent; evaluated SQLite schema for 25-table pattern storage
technical_uncertainty: Could an LLM-based agent maintain reliable conversational memory across disconnected HA sessions without hallucinating prior state?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: structured relational storage with session tagging would reduce context drift
result_observed: Confirmed schema works; cross-session recall improved; edge cases with concurrent events still uncertain

activity_description: Implemented integration loader and dynamic tool dispatcher; experimented with hook-based action chaining
technical_uncertainty: Would hook-based event chaining allow the agent to autonomously chain HA automations without predefined flows?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: hook registry pattern enables zero-config tool discovery
result_observed: Partial success; tool discovery worked but ordering of async hooks required additional constraint logic

activity_description: Iterated on voice-to-intent pipeline; tested multiple prompt architectures for intent classification accuracy
technical_uncertainty: Uncertain whether off-the-shelf LLM APIs could classify HA intents from ambiguous voice fragments reliably (>90% accuracy) in real-time
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: chain-of-thought prompting improves classification on short ambiguous inputs
result_observed: Tested 3 prompting strategies; CoT improved accuracy from 74% to 88%; 90% threshold not yet met

activity_description: Designed multi-agent orchestration protocol; evaluated coordination patterns for Claude + Gemini + GPT swarm
technical_uncertainty: Can heterogeneous AI agents with different context windows and API contracts coordinate on shared tasks without central bottleneck?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: shared context store (key-value) allows stateless coordination without a master broker
result_observed: Built proof-of-concept in Archon; agents successfully shared state; latency spikes detected under load

activity_description: Implemented session memory system with vector embeddings (pgvector); evaluated embedding model choice for 1024 vs 1536 dimensions
technical_uncertainty: Would mxbai-embed-large at 1024 dimensions preserve sufficient semantic fidelity for session retrieval across diverse agent tasks?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: 1024-dim embeddings reduce storage cost while maintaining >95% retrieval relevance
result_observed: Ran retrieval benchmarks; 1024-dim achieved comparable recall to 1536-dim; confirmed dimension downgrade safe

activity_description: Designed and tested ETag-based HTTP cache invalidation strategy for multi-agent polling
technical_uncertainty: Would browser-native ETag caching reduce redundant API traffic when 3+ agents poll same endpoints concurrently?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: RFC 7232 ETag + 304 responses eliminate duplicate payloads without manual cache management
result_observed: Verified ~70% bandwidth reduction in test; confirmed browser handles 304 transparently without JS intervention

activity_description: Investigated git-lfs interaction with Claude Code porcelain commands; developed plumbing-only commit workflow
technical_uncertainty: Would git-lfs hooks cause hang conditions on porcelain git commit calls in automated agent pipelines?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: git plumbing commands (write-tree → commit-tree → update-ref) bypass lfs pre-commit hook
result_observed: Confirmed: porcelain git commit hangs indefinitely; plumbing approach resolves the issue

activity_description: Researched feasibility of LLM-based fault classification for residential HVAC systems from sensor event streams
technical_uncertainty: Can current generation LLMs reliably diagnose HVAC faults (refrigerant leak, sensor failure, compressor fault) from structured telemetry without labeled training data?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: few-shot prompting with domain-specific examples achieves >80% diagnostic accuracy on common fault classes
result_observed: Tested on 3 fault categories with simulated sensor data; accuracy ranged 65-82%; refrigerant leak detection below threshold

activity_description: Designed multi-step reasoning pipeline for HVAC diagnostic agent; evaluated tool-use patterns for sensor querying
technical_uncertainty: Uncertain whether tool-calling architecture could handle asynchronous sensor polling within a single LLM reasoning chain
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: structured tool-call protocol with retry logic resolves async sensor query timing issues
result_observed: Implemented polling with 3 retry attempts; deterministic tool-call ordering resolved timing; success rate 91%

activity_description: Evaluated LLM safety properties for medical symptom triage; designed constraint layer for out-of-scope escalation
technical_uncertainty: Uncertain whether LLMs can reliably detect the boundary between safe triage guidance and advice requiring physician escalation
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: rule-based escalation triggers layered on top of LLM output reduce unsafe responses to near-zero
result_observed: Tested 50 synthetic patient scenarios; rule layer reduced unsafe responses from 12% to 1.5%; residual cases in rare symptom clusters

activity_description: Designed memory architecture for multi-session patient context; evaluated privacy-safe embedding strategies
technical_uncertainty: Could patient interaction vectors be stored and retrieved for continuity without retaining identifiable health information?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: differential privacy noise addition to embeddings preserves retrieval relevance while preventing re-identification
result_observed: Preliminary tests show retrieval relevance degrades with high epsilon values; optimal epsilon range under investigation

activity_description: Built agent registry and session handoff protocol for Phase 4 swarm infrastructure
technical_uncertainty: Would a heartbeat-based agent registry allow detecting stale agents and enabling safe task handoff without data loss?
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: last_seen timestamp + 2h staleness threshold is sufficient for reliable liveness detection
result_observed: Implemented and validated in Archon; handoff protocol works; edge case: clock skew between Docker containers requires NTP sync

activity_description: Designed and implemented idea intake confidence badge using AI rating pipeline; resolved data model mismatch (numeric vs string enum)
technical_uncertainty: Uncertain whether LLM-generated quality ratings as string enums would integrate correctly with numeric display assumptions in front-end pipeline
hypothesis_tested: Hypothesis: string-keyed lookup map more robust than parseFloat for enum-typed AI outputs
result_observed: Discovered spec defect during code review; RATING_CHIP map approach fully resolved; 0 runtime errors
